3333900.name: Timber Trails Alpine Puzzle
3333900.description:
Step into the Alps — one stunning puzzle at a time.
Timber Trails: Alpine Puzzle transports you into a serene mountain realm of snow-tipped peaks, pine forests, rustic cabins, and hidden trails. Piece together gorgeous jigsaw scenes from 30 up to 285 pieces, and gradually unveil more alpine landscapes, cozy huts, and secret mountain paths. Steam Store

Whether you’re a puzzle veteran or just seeking a calm escape, each puzzle invites you to slow down, observe, and appreciate the quiet beauty of nature.

Key Features

  • Wide puzzle range: choose from gentle 30-piece puzzles to richer 285-piece challenges Steam Store

  • Unlockable landscapes: every solved puzzle reveals a new alpine setting or cabin tucked in the mountains Steam Store

  • Hidden trails & scenic secrets: uncover mountain paths and visual surprises as you progress Steam Store

  • Relaxed pacing: no timers or forced pace — take all the time you like Steam Store

  • Singleplayer, family-friendly: designed for solo enjoyment across all ages Steam Store

  • High-quality nature artwork: detailed scenes of cabins, forests, peaks, and alpine life Steam Store

  • Expansion content available: additional puzzles via DLC (Pack 1, Pack 2, Pack 3) Steam Store+1

About This Game

In Timber Trails: Alpine Puzzle, your journey begins with a modest 30-piece puzzle of a quiet chalet or forest vista. As you assemble each piece, you watch the image emerge: smoke curling from a chimney, snow settling on branches, light dancing across peaks. Complete more puzzles, and you unlock higher-piece challenges and new scenes deeper into the mountains.

Each new scene reveals a fresh story: a cabin perched by a ridge, a forest trail winding between trees, a hidden footpath through the pines, or a panorama of ridge lines under a pastel sunset. With each unlock, the world of Timber Trails expands—more scenery, more depth, more ambiance.

The game encourages meditative play. There’s no clock, no penalty for mistakes: you can pause, adjust, reorient, or revisit puzzles anytime. This gentle pace allows you to focus fully on the imagery, the shapes, and the moment. Mistakes aren’t obstacles; they’re part of the exploration.

Replay any puzzle you like—improve your time, discover unseen details, or simply enjoy the satisfying act of putting pieces together again. The blend of accessible to challenging puzzles ensures there’s always something waiting for you, whether you're in for a five-minute break or a long evening of immersive puzzle play.

The DLC expansions offer fresh content too. New puzzles added via Expansion Packs deepen your mountain journey, adding variety and more scenes to explore.
